## Summary

Describe the change and its user impact.

## Checklist (Advanced Context Coding)

- [ ] Updated relevant docs if entrypoints or flows changed
  - [ ] `docs/ENTRYPOINTS.md`
  - [ ] `docs/FLOWS.md`
  - [ ] `docs/TASKS.md`
- [ ] Used `@/` imports; avoided barrel files
- [ ] No `@ts-ignore` or `as any`; proper types used
- [ ] Tests considered/updated
  - [ ] E2E covers new/changed flows or a gap noted in `docs/SCENARIOS.md`
- [ ] Commands needed are listed in `docs/COMMANDS.md` if new

## Screenshots / Video

Attach if UI changed.
